creator: Ultima1252@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Marco Beishuizen from comment #3)
 This sounds like a bug, did this occur with the old driver as well? I haven't looked deep enough into it to be sure. I suggest opening new bug about this if it doesn't already exist.


346 --> 367 has many changes and is possible that some file/files were missed with the restructuring nvidia made between these versions.
